notes: Aluminum 5083-H131 per MIL-A-46027. Common armor-grade aluminum alloy used in light armored vehicles and amphibious platforms. RHAe ~0.30-0.40 per mm vs small arms per MIL-HDBK-5J ballistic data. Lower strength than 7039/7075 but superior weldability and corrosion resistance. Used in AAV7A1, LAV-25, M113 hull structures.

source.methodology: RHAe from MIL-HDBK-5J ballistic limit curves for 5083-H131 vs small arms, normalized to RHA thickness. Density per MIL-A-46027 specification.
